name: Battery X Metals Inc.
description: Battery X Metals Inc. is a Canadian junior exploration company focused on the acquisition and exploration of critical battery metals and precious metals in North America, alongside the development of battery recycling technology. Its flagship Y Lithium Project in northern Saskatchewan spans 5,855 hectares and is prospective for lithium-cesium-tantalum (LCT) pegmatites, with sampling returning up to 0.741% Li2O. The company also holds gold and base metal claims in Ontario's Red Lake Mining District and operates a wholly owned battery recycling subsidiary, Battery X Recycling Technologies Inc.
